questions.text: Does the company have a formal board of directors or supervisory board?
questions.actionLabel: Establish a formal board of directors

questions.text: What share of the board is made up of independent directors?
Is an audit committee in place?
Is a remuneration and nomination committee in place?
questions.actionLabel: Create a remuneration and nomination committee

questions.text: Does the board meet at least quarterly with formal minutes?
questions.actionLabel: Formalise quarterly board meetings with minutes

questions.text: Are the roles of chair and chief executive clearly separated, or is their combination formally justified?
questions.actionLabel: Clarify the separation of chair and CEO roles

questions.text: Is the cap table fully documented and up to date?
questions.actionLabel: Consolidate and document the cap table

questions.text: Is the shareholders' agreement compatible with a public listing?
questions.actionLabel: Review the shareholders' agreement for listing compatibility

choices.label: Reviewed and compatible with a listing
Agreement contains clauses incompatible with a listing

questions.text: Are stock option and free-share plans (BSPCE, AGA) fully documented?
Is the corporate legal form compatible with a listing?
questions.actionLabel: Convert to a listing-compatible legal form (SA)

questions.text: Have the bylaws been reviewed by legal counsel in the last two years?
questions.actionLabel: Have the bylaws reviewed by counsel

questions.text: Are related-party transactions identified and documented?
Does the board operate under a governance charter or internal rules?
Is directors' and officers' (D&O) liability insurance in place?
How advanced is the succession plan for key executives?
questions.actionLabel: Prepare a succession plan for key executives

questions.text: Are delegations of authority formalised in writing?
Are minority shareholders' rights identified and respected?
Is the group structure chart (subsidiaries and holdings) clear and documented?
Is the company free of ongoing shareholder disputes?
Does the board receive monthly financial reporting?
questions.actionLabel: Provide the board with monthly financial reporting

questions.text: Are three years of annual financial statements available?
questions.actionLabel: Prepare three years of financial statements

questions.text: Are the statements prepared under a recognised framework (French GAAP or IFRS)?
questions.actionLabel: Restate the accounts under a recognised framework

questions.text: Where does the company stand on IFRS conversion?
How consistently has revenue grown over the last three years?
Is EBITDA positive?
questions.actionLabel: Build a credible path to positive EBITDA

questions.text: How does the EBITDA margin compare with the sector average?
Is there a reliable rolling cash forecast covering at least 12 months?
Is net debt below three times EBITDA?
Are debt covenants documented and monitored?
Are working capital requirements modelled and monitored?
Is budget-versus-actual variance tracked monthly?
Is there a three-year business plan with financial projections?
Is the revenue recognition policy documented?
Are off-balance-sheet commitments inventoried?
If the company is a group, are consolidated accounts prepared?
How fast is the monthly accounting close?
questions.actionLabel: Shorten the monthly close to under 15 days

questions.text: Is the finance team sized for public-company reporting?
questions.actionLabel: Strengthen the finance team ahead of listing

choices.label: CFO with a structured finance department

questions.text: Has the tax position been reviewed with no material open disputes?
Are intercompany flows documented at arm's length?
questions.actionLabel: Document intercompany flows at arm's length

questions.text: Is the equity story quantified, including use of proceeds?
questions.actionLabel: Draft a quantified equity story and use of proceeds

questions.text: What is the company's current annual revenue?
How strong has revenue growth (CAGR) been over the last three years?
What share of revenue is recurring or repeat business?
Is there a documented market study (TAM / SAM / SOM)?
How concentrated is revenue on the top ten clients?
How diversified is revenue across geographies?
How diversified is the product or service portfolio?
Does the order pipeline or backlog give at least six months of visibility?
questions.actionLabel: Build pipeline reporting with six-month visibility

questions.text: Has the company demonstrated pricing power (price increases without churn)?
Is competitive positioning documented against named peers?
questions.actionLabel: Document competitive positioning against named peers

questions.text: Is the growth strategy formalised (organic and external)?
How reliably were forecasts achieved over the last two budget cycles?
How scalable is the sales organisation beyond the founders?
questions.actionLabel: Structure a sales organisation independent of the founders

questions.text: Are churn and retention measured and at healthy levels?
Is there a funded R&D or innovation roadmap?
Is dependence on key suppliers identified and managed?
Are unit economics documented (CAC/LTV or unit margins)?
Are barriers to entry identified (IP, contracts, network effects)?
Are acquisition targets or partnerships identified for the IPO proceeds?
Is the growth capital-expenditure plan quantified?
Is a statutory auditor (commissaire aux comptes) appointed?
What is the audit status of the last three fiscal years?
questions.actionLabel: Complete statutory audits of the accounts

questions.text: How well documented are internal control procedures?
Is a risk map established and regularly updated?
Is the GDPR register of processing activities in place?
Is a DPO appointed or GDPR ownership clearly assigned?
questions.actionLabel: Assign GDPR ownership or appoint a DPO

questions.text: Is an anti-corruption programme in place (Sapin II if in scope)?
Are key contracts inventoried with change-of-control clauses reviewed?
questions.actionLabel: Review change-of-control clauses in key contracts

questions.text: Is all intellectual property registered and owned by the company?
Is the litigation inventory clear of material disputes?
Is employment compliance ensured (contracts, staff representation bodies)?
Are all sector-specific licences and authorisations valid?
Has the insurance programme been reviewed in the last two years?
How mature are the cybersecurity policy and incident response plan?
Is a whistleblowing channel available?
Has a code of ethics been distributed to employees?
Are KYC/AML obligations covered, or confirmed not applicable?
How far has the company assessed its CSRD / sustainability reporting obligations?
Are data hosting contracts compliant with localisation requirements?
Is compliance ownership identified at executive level?
Is a monthly management reporting pack produced?
questions.actionLabel: Set up a monthly management reporting pack

questions.text: How well are KPIs defined for each business line?
questions.actionLabel: Define KPIs for each business line

questions.text: Are financial KPIs reconciled with the accounting records?
How are management dashboards produced?
questions.actionLabel: Automate dashboards in a BI tool

questions.text: Is there a single source of truth with clear data ownership?
questions.actionLabel: Establish a single source of truth for data

questions.text: Is there a reporting calendar with firm deadlines?
How developed is non-financial (ESG) indicator tracking?
Can results be reported by segment (activity or geography)?
Is there an audit trail from each KPI back to source data?
questions.actionLabel: Build an audit trail from KPIs to source data

questions.text: Is the forecast updated at least quarterly (reforecast)?
Is the board pack standardised from month to month?
Does an investor-grade company presentation exist?
Is there a documented accounting manual and closing procedures?
How scalable is the ERP / accounting system?
questions.actionLabel: Upgrade the ERP or accounting system

questions.text: Is at least three years of historical data accessible and consistent?
questions.actionLabel: Consolidate three years of consistent historical data

questions.text: How much experience does the company have with press or financial communication?
Is a corporate website with a financial section ready?
questions.actionLabel: Prepare the corporate website's investor section

questions.text: Were internal deadlines met for the last four closings?
Is reporting free of dependence on a single person?
Is reporting aligned with the requirements of the target market (Euronext Growth / Access)?
questions.actionLabel: Align reporting with target market requirements
